description:
## Component: hx-tag (NEW)
**Tier 1 — Universal Foundation | Industry Consensus: 5/6 libraries**

Removable or static label for categories, filters, and selections. Distinct from badge — tags represent user-applied or filterable labels.

### ADR-001 Classification: Property-Driven (Atomic)
Properties control variant and removability. Default slot accepts label text.

### API Design
**Properties:** `variant` (primary|secondary|neutral|outline), `removable` (boolean), `disabled`, `hx-size` (sm|md|lg), `selected` (boolean — for filter tag toggle)
**Slots:** Default (tag text), `prefix` (icon)
**CSS Parts:** `tag`, `remove-button`, `prefix`
**Events:** `hx-remove` (composed: true), `hx-select` (for toggle mode)

### Drupal Integration
```twig
{# Taxonomy term tags from Drupal #}
{% for term in node.field_conditions %}
  <hx-tag variant="secondary">{{ term.entity.label }}</hx-tag>
{% endfor %}

{# Removable filter tags #}
{% for filter in active_filters %}
  <hx-tag removable variant="primary">{{ filter.label }}</hx-tag>
{% endfor %}
```

### Healthcare: Diagnosis tags, allergy labels, active filter display, medication categories

### Acceptance Criteria
1. Static and removable modes
2. Selected state for filter toggle behavior
3. Remove button fires hx-remove event (Drupal behavior handles filter removal)
4. Works in hx-combobox multi-select display
5. Icon prefix slot for categorized tags
title: T1-20: hx-tag — Removable/Static Label
